markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 621. Gen. Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size & Weight
##### § 621.407 — Forms; Accounting Procedures

The department shall prescribe all forms and accounting procedures necessary to carry out Sections 621.401 (Definition) to 621.406.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: The department shall prescribe all forms and accounting procedures necessary to carry out Sections 621.401 (Definition) to 621.406.
